name: MiniGit
v1_prompt: Implement {{binary_name}} as described in SPEC-v1.txt using {{language}}. CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS: (1) ALL repository data MUST be stored under '.minigit/' — NOT '.git/' or any other name. (2) You MUST implement MiniHash exactly as specified: initialize h=1469598103934665603, for each byte: h = (h XOR byte) * 1099511628211 mod 2^64, output as 16-char zero-padded lowercase hex. Do NOT use random values, SHA, or any crypto library. (3) Directory structure must be exactly: .minigit/objects/, .minigit/commits/, .minigit/index, .minigit/HEAD. (4) Output messages must match the spec exactly. The executable must be named '{{binary_name}}' and be runnable as ./{{binary_name}}. For compiled languages, include a build.sh script. For interpreted languages, ensure the {{binary_name}} file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
v2_prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing {{binary_name}} implementation with the new commands. CRITICAL: Keep using '.minigit/' for all storage (NOT '.git/'). Keep the MiniHash function unchanged. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v2.sh
